title: Münster, North Rhine-Westphalia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Münster, North Rhine-Westphalia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Münster is a city in North Rhine-Westphalia with a population of 315,000. Germany’s bicycle capital, a historic university city with a beautiful old town, the Peace of Westphalia heritage, and a vibrant student life.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
